/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wno-comment -Wno-reorder -Wno-unused-variable -Wtype-limits -std=c++14 -fno-strict-aliasing -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -march=native -mfpmath=sse -mavx2 -DLV_HAVE_AVX2 -DLV_HAVE_AVX -DLV_HAVE_SSE -fvisibility=hidden -O3 -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE -Werror -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/prach_test_usrp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/prach_test_usrp.dir/prach_test_usrp.c.o -o prach_test_usrp  -Wl,-rpath,/home/avi/wireless/ra-spoof/srsRAN_4G/build/lib/src/phy/rf ../../rf/libsrsran_rf.so.25.10.0 ../../libsrsran_phy.a -lpthread -ldl ../../rf/libsrsran_rf_utils.a ../../libsrsran_phy.a -lpthread -lm /usr/lib64/libfftw3f.so
